summary: Backend-only testing of RPG Codex API complete. All 20 pytest cases passed (100%). Covered: root online, auth (invalid/missing session, /auth/me with+without bearer, logout deletes session), entries CRUD as admin (create/get/list+filters/featured/update/delete/404), stats/counts aggregation, non-admin 403 on /entries and /upload, /upload with/without auth (1x1 PNG round-tripped), and /files/{path} serving bytes with correct image/png content-type. Auth supports both cookie and Authorization: Bearer. Seeded admin + non-admin users and sessions directly in Mongo (test_database) per /app/auth_testing.md; cleaned up on teardown.

minor.issue: Returns null body with 200 when no featured entry exists. Works but could return 404 for stricter semantics (current behavior acceptable for frontend).
When Emergent Auth exchange raises non-HTTP errors (e.g. network), server responds 401 'Invalid session_id' which slightly conflates auth and upstream outage. Acceptable.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') hooks — consider migrating to lifespan context for forward compatibility.
GET /api/files/{path:path} is public: any user who knows a storage_path can fetch it. Fine for entry images, but flag for future access control if private uploads are added.
/api/entries/featured prefers characters then any featured — when none exist it returns `null` with 200; frontend must handle null response explicitly.
put_object/get_object use synchronous requests inside async handlers — blocks event loop under load; consider httpx.AsyncClient.
CORS allow_origins falls back to [] when CORS_ORIGINS unset — not an issue now since env is set, but could silently break cross-origin calls if env is cleared.
No pagination metadata on GET /entries (only limit). Fine for small codex, but add skip/total if dataset grows.
EntryCreate/Update do not enforce allowed category/subcategory enums — any string accepted.
test_credentials: Seeded on the fly via pymongo into test_database: admin user with session_token 'test_session_admin_<uuid>', non-admin user with 'test_session_user_<uuid>'. Emails end with @aethryl.test. Cleaned up by fixtures.
seed_data_creation: Fixtures create 1 admin user + session, 1 non-admin user + session, 2 entries (TEST_Kael featured character, TEST_SwordOfTest item) and 1 uploaded PNG; all deleted on teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use /app/backend/tests/test_rpg_codex_api.py as regression. It seeds+cleans its own users/sessions/entries/files. For quick runs: `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_rpg_codex_api.py -v`. All endpoints listed in the review request are covered. Upload test depends on Emergent object storage (EMERGENT_LLM_KEY); it auto-skips on 500.
